title: Create: World of Color
description: A take on the Create Mod in the Programmer Art style!
body:
## _"The sky is the limit..."_ ![Minecraft logo style, reading CREATE on the top line and WORLD OF COLOR on the bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38c966ec0d5689ab3a795c682e67be8ddd1744e3.png) # ![Some tiny item textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93a1e6f42cc450c2c12b5cb462249218e27f47a4.png) **Create: World of Color** ![More tiny item textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43c74602d424e049d5d207f757e2fc036c5c8b7c.png) ...is a resource pack designed to emulate what [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) would look like in Minecraft's **Programmer Art** style!

[![A button with text that says Report Issues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4810204932f5155b4cb528e3f384c3727e7b6170.png)](https://github.com/soapinamicrowave/createworldofcolor/issues) [![A button with text that says Gallery Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e08febc882d3ce054ad32238f9e997d95de29a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-world-of-color/gallery) [![A button with text that says View Source](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/165bb894282cb777e4127ebfffe7be8a34e0251f.png)](https://github.com/soapinamicrowave/createworldofcolor) ## Recommendation [![A button with PACP's pack.png on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412fa3790da06dd8525167ddd334ec090b7d4db4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
Add [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) underneath this pack but above the regular **Programmer Art** (as shown in the image below) for the optimal experience.
(A lot of palettes or textures in this pack take direct reference off of PACP for parity!) ![An example of how to order the packs, from bottom to up, being Programmer Art, PACP, and Create: World of Color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ae6b5ae108a1c1586f4e5af356545fb2b0c871.png) ## Credits - gracedatgirl - That's me! Create: World of Color has been a passion project of mine for... well, far too long! I've always been fond of the Programmer Art style, and I'd consider Create one of the best Minecraft mods I know, so... it felt pretty natural to happen eventually! - [flabberghastio](https://modrinth.com/user/flabberghastio) - Did some of the copper palettes for me in the v0.9 update! If it weren't for them, the update probably would've taken at least a week longer than it actually did... - [PACP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) Team - As said already, their textures are the general base for a lot of things in Create: World of Color! Huge shout out to them!!! Their work is incredible!!
